full_description: Trip Planner is a travel app that assists users in planning and organizing their trips, from booking flights to finding local attractions. It provides a comprehensive and user-friendly platform for travelers to manage their itineraries. With Trip Planner, you can research destinations, book hotels and flights, and create a personalized itinerary. The app also allows you to find and book local activities, such as tours and experiences, and provides recommendations for restaurants and other points of interest. Additionally, Trip Planner enables you to share your itinerary with others, making it easy to coordinate with travel companions. Whether you're planning a quick weekend getaway or a longer, more complex trip, Trip Planner is the perfect tool to help you make the most of your travel experience.
